page_content:
Prerequisite: LARC120 and LARC141.

Recommended: LARC240 and LARC265.

Restriction: Sophomore standing or higher; and must be in Landscape Architecture program.

LARC230 Design Fundamentals Studio (5 Credits)

Introduction to the fundamentals of basic design focusing on creative problem solving associated with landscape architecture. Here you will explore design with different geometries, organizing principles, concept development, spatial definition, land formation, structures and plants. Emphasis will be given on how to represent design ideas using measured drafting techniques and presentation board organization. A series of foundational exercises will culminate in the redesign of a small public space.

Prerequisite: Must have completed or be concurrently enrolled in LARC265 and LARC266.
